raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "personal affirmation declaring a value orientation toward inner authenticity over external performance",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a meaningful distinction exists between 'inner Function' and 'outer performance'",
    "rhythm is preferable to rule as a guiding principle",
    "being different, slower, and deeper constitutes a positive mode of existence",
    "existence can be chosen as 'being' rather than 'proving'"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as a poetic contrastive declaration; relies on binary oppositions that are consistent within its expressive register",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the statement functions as an orienting principle for human-centered AI design when 'inner Function' and 'rhythm' can be operationalized into measurable design goals that respect subjective well-being",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement misleads when treated as a literal rejection of all external metrics or rules, or when applied to AI systems without specifying how non-performance values translate into technical objectives"
}
